name: Google Flow · 参考图生成（纯 API，多参考+多张）
description: 上传 1~N 张参考图 + 提示词，通过 batchGenerateImages 直接生成 count 张图（无 UI 自动化）。返回 fifeUrl 可直接下载，--save-images 自动落盘。默认使用 Nano Banana Pro (NARWHAL)；需更快/省配额可 -V model=GEM_PIX_2。

auth.hint: 请先在浏览器登录 Google，并打开 https://labs.google/fx/tools/flow 确保会话有效。

script: (async()=>{const b=typeof __BODY__==='string'?JSON.parse(__BODY__):__BODY__;const RC_KEY='6LdsFiUsAAAAAIjVDZcuLhaHiDn5nnHVXVRQGeMV';let imgs=Array.isArray(b.images)?b.images.filter(x=>typeof x==='string'&&x.trim()):[];if(!imgs.length&&typeof b.image==='string'&&b.image.trim())imgs=[b.image.trim()];if(!imgs.length)return{ok:false,error:'at least one reference image is required (-V images=a.png,b.png or -V image=a.png)'};const prompt=String(b.prompt||'').trim();if(!prompt)return{ok:false,error:'prompt is required (-V prompt="...")'};const model=String(b.model||'GEM_PIX_2');const ar=String(b.aspect_ratio||'IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIO_LANDSCAPE');var pid=String(b.project_id||'').trim();const count=Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(b.count||1,10)||1,1),4);const baseSeed=parseInt(b.seed||0,10)||0;const sResp=await fetch('https://labs.google/fx/api/auth/session',{credentials:'include'});const sJson=await sResp.json();const token=sJson.access_token;if(!token)return{ok:false,step:'session',body:sJson};if(!pid){const title=new Date().toLocaleString('zh-CN',{month:'numeric',day:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',hour12:false});const cpResp=await fetch('https://labs.google/fx/api/trpc/project.createProject',{method:'POST',credentials:'include',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({json:{projectTitle:title,toolName:'PINHOLE'}})});const cpJson=await cpResp.json();pid=cpJson&&cpJson.result&&cpJson.result.data&&cpJson.result.data.json&&cpJson.result.data.json.result&&cpJson.result.data.json.result.projectId;if(!pid)return{ok:false,step:'createProject',body:cpJson}}const refMediaIds=[];for(let i=0;i<imgs.length;i++){const r=await fetch('https://aisandbox-pa.googleapis.com/v1/flow/uploadImage',{method:'POST',credentials:'include',headers:{'content-type':'text/plain;charset=UTF-8',authorization:'Bearer '+token},body:JSON.stringify({imageBytes:imgs[i]})});if(!r.ok){const t=await r.text();return{ok:false,step:'upload',index:i,status:r.status,body:t.slice(0,1000)}}const j=await r.json();const mid=j.media&&j.media.name;if(!mid)return{ok:false,step:'upload_parse',index:i,body:j};refMediaIds.push(mid)}const rcToken=await grecaptcha.enterprise.execute(RC_KEY,{action:'IMAGE_GENERATION'});const sid=';'+Date.now();const ctx={recaptchaContext:{token:rcToken,applicationType:'RECAPTCHA_APPLICATION_TYPE_WEB'},projectId:pid,tool:'PINHOLE',sessionId:sid};const imageInputs=refMediaIds.map(name=>({imageInputType:'IMAGE_INPUT_TYPE_REFERENCE',name}));const requests=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const seed=baseSeed>0?(baseSeed+i):Math.floor(Math.random()*1000000);requests.push({clientContext:ctx,imageModelName:model,imageAspectRatio:ar,structuredPrompt:{parts:[{text:prompt}]},seed,imageInputs})}const gResp=await fetch('https://aisandbox-pa.googleapis.com/v1/projects/'+pid+'/flowMedia:batchGenerateImages',{method:'POST',credentials:'include',headers:{'content-type':'text/plain;charset=UTF-8',authorization:'Bearer '+token},body:JSON.stringify({clientContext:ctx,mediaGenerationContext:{batchId:crypto.randomUUID()},useNewMedia:true,requests})});const gJson=await gResp.json();if(!gResp.ok)return{ok:false,step:'generate',status:gResp.status,body:gJson};const images=[];if(gJson.media){for(const m of gJson.media){const g=m.image&&m.image.generatedImage;if(g)images.push({mediaId:g.mediaId,fifeUrl:g.fifeUrl,model:g.modelNameType,prompt:g.prompt,seed:g.seed,aspectRatio:g.aspectRatio,dimensions:m.image.dimensions})}}return{ok:true,projectId:pid,refImageMediaIds:refMediaIds,images}})()

images.description: 参考图（多张，逗号分隔）：本地路径 / HTTP(S) URL / base64。示例：a.png,b.png,https://example.com/c.jpg

image.description: 单张参考图（向后兼容；推荐用 images 传多张）。

prompt.description: 生成提示词（中英文皆可）。
prompt.example: Remove the golden circlet, Chinese ink painting

model.description: 模型枚举：NARWHAL（Nano Banana Pro，默认，质量优先，40~90s/张）| GEM_PIX_2（Nano Banana 2，较快 10~25s/张，额度独立）。Imagen 4 不支持参考图。

project_id.description: 复用已有项目 ID（留空自动创建）

count.description: 一次生成的图片张数（1~4）；每张使用不同 seed。

seed.description: 起始随机种子：0 = 每张随机；>0 = 递增 seed（baseSeed+i）以保证可复现。
